questions.question: Which state/UT is set to launch the ‘Mukhyamantri Vidhwa Evam Ekal Nari Awas Yojna’?
questions.explanation: Mukhyamantri Vidhwa Evam Ekal Nari Awas Yojna is set to be launched by the Himachal Pradesh Government. Under this scheme, financial assistance will be provided for widows and single women to construct houses.

questions.question: As of 2023, a woman who adopts a child at the age below three months old is entitled for maternity leave of how many weeks?
questions.explanation: The Section 5(4) of the Maternity Benefit Act, 1961 allows woman who adopts a child at the age below three months old to be entitled for 12 weeks of maternity leave. The Supreme Court has recently agreed to hear a petition challenging this provision.

questions.question: Which Indian company manufactures the ‘R21/Matrix-M Vaccine’?
questions.explanation: The R21/Matrix-M vaccine is a malaria vaccine developed by the Oxford University and manufactured by the Serum Institute of India. The vaccine, which leverages Novavax’s adjuvant technology, has been licensed for use in Ghana by the country’s Food and Drugs Authority.

questions.question: ‘Festival of Innovation and Entrepreneurship (FINE) 2023’ was organised by which Union Ministry?

options.label: D
options.text: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

questions.explanation: Festival of Innovation and Entrepreneurship (FINE) 2023 was organized by the National Innovation Foundation – an autonomous institute under the Department of Science and Technology (DST). It included five round tables covering different aspects of innovation and entrepreneurship ecosystem in India.

questions.question: ‘Incident Management Services’ is associated with which Union Ministry?

options.label: B
options.text: Ministry of Road Transport and Highways

options.label: C
options.text: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

options.label: D
options.text: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers welfare

answer.label: C
answer.text: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs

questions.explanation: The Union Ministry of road transport and highways is planning to extend its Incident Management Services (IMS) to all national highways. The purpose of this step is to minimize road fatalities and improve safety for road users. Incident Management Services (IMS) on national roads will be provided, run, and maintained by businesses.

questions.question: Which institution has launched the ‘Mission 50K-EV4ECO’?
questions.explanation: The Small Industries Development Bank of India (SIDBI) has announced the launch of a pilot phase of ‘Mission 50K-EV4ECO’ The pilot scheme aims at strengthening the EV ecosystem, including uptake for two, three and four-wheelers through direct and indirect lending.

questions.question: The ‘World Chagas Disease Day’ observed across the world during which month?
questions.explanation: World Chagas Disease Day is observed by the World Health Organisation (WHO) on April 14. It raises awareness about the Chagas disease. Chagas is a communicable parasitic disease that infected over 6 to 7 million people. The theme for 2023 is Time to integrate Chagas disease into primary health care.

questions.question: Which city is the host of the ‘G20 Space Economy Leaders Meeting’ in India?
questions.explanation: The G20 Space Economy Leaders Meeting was organized in Shillong in April 2023. The Meeting is being organised under India’s G20 presidency by the Department of Space, Government of India. The Indian Space Research Organisation (ISRO) will be organizing the precursor event of this meeting.

questions.question: Which Indian state/UT announced ‘Dr. B R Ambedkar Award’ for recognising people involved in the welfare of Dalits?
questions.explanation: The Telangana Government recently announced an award in the name of Babasaheb Dr. B R Ambedkar. The government will form Rs.51 crore corpus for this award and every year. Rs.3 crore worth of award will be given to anyone involved in the welfare of Dalits.

questions.question: When is World Hemophilia Day observed every year?
questions.explanation: April 17 is observed as the World Hemophilia Day and the theme for this year is “Access for All: Prevention of bleeds as the global standard of care”. Hemophilia is a rare genetic blood disorder that inhibits the clotting of blood, leading to significant bleeding during injuries and surgeries. Every year, the World Hemophilia Day is observed to raise awareness about this disorder.
